title: The All India Council for Technical Education Act, 1987
full_text: The All India Council for Technical Education Act, 1987 अखिल भारतीय तकनीकी शिक्षा परिषद् अधिनियम, 1987 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198752 Act Number: 52 Enactment Date: 1987-12-23 Act Year: 1987 Short Title: The All India Council for Technical Education Act, 1987 Hindi Title: अखिल भारतीय तकनीकी शिक्षा परिषद् अधिनियम, 1987 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of an All India Council for Technical Education with a view to the proper planning and co-ordinated development of the technical education system throughout the country, the promotion of qualitative improvement of such education in relation to planned quantitative growth and the regulation and proper maintenance of norms and standards in the technical education system and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 28-03-1988 Notification: 28th March, 1988, vide notification No. S.O. 317 (E), dated 28th March, 1988, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Section 17. Budget. Section 18. Annual report. Section 19. Accounts and audit. Section 20. Directions by the Central Government. Section 21. Power to supersede the Council. Section 22. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 25. Power to remove difficulties.
